current_inventory.laptop: HP Pavilion 15-n010tx — i3-3217U, 4GB RAM, HDD (failing SATA)
current_inventory.phone1: Xiaomi Mi 8 (dipper, SD845, SDK 35) — secondary QEMU host
blockers: 4GB RAM limits QEMU guest performance and parallel workloads
Failing SATA cable causes I/O instability [PDF: critical infrastructure risk]
i3-3217U (2012 CPU) bottlenecks any ML-adjacent workloads
No NVMe on current laptop — all storage on spinning disk

investments.reason: Eliminates I/O failures that corrupt QEMU disk images [PDF: hardware infrastructure risk]

investments.item: 16GB DDR3L SO-DIMM RAM upgrade (HP Pavilion compatible)
investments.reason: Doubles QEMU capacity. Enables 2x guests + Zen Loop + verifier simultaneously
investments.where: OLX / Amazon India / local PC shop
investments.note: HP Pavilion 15-n010tx supports max 8GB per slot, 2 slots = 16GB

investments.reason: 10x I/O improvement. QEMU disk images on SSD = dramatically faster guest boot
investments.where: Amazon India — brands: WD Green, Kingston A400

phase_1_immediate_under_5000_inr.expected_uplift: 50-100% QEMU performance improvement. Eliminates data corruption risk.
phase_1_immediate_under_5000_inr.pdf_reference: PDF Phase 1: Foundation & Secure Initialization — budget cap $5/mo

investments.reason: Replaces phones as reliable background worker. ARM64 native. 24/7 uptime. No battery drain.

investments.item: 4TB External HDD (USB 3.0) for artifact + bundle storage
investments.reason: Git bundle archive, QCOW2 image backups, research cache persistence
Wired LAN eliminates WiFi instability for Phone2 hotspot setup
Offload Git remote, webhook receiver, and light API relay away from phones

phase_2_beta_launch_5000_30000_inr.expected_uplift: Stable 24/7 mesh without phone battery dependency. Customer-grade uptime.
phase_2_beta_launch_5000_30000_inr.pdf_reference: PDF Phase 2: Hardened Mobile Deployment & Optimizations — Mobile Node Setup

investments.item: Mini PC / NUC (Intel N100, 16GB RAM, 512GB NVMe)
investments.reason: Replace HP Pavilion as primary. N100 = 4x performance, fanless, 8W TDP.
investments.where: Amazon India — Beelink Mini S12 Pro

investments.item: Upgraded VPS (4 vCPU, 8GB RAM) for swarm factory staging
investments.reason: Run Swarm B (Build) and Swarm C (QA) on cloud without touching home hardware
Tamil Nadu power cuts kill QEMU disk integrity. UPS = 20-min ride-out.

phase_3_first_revenue_30000_100000_inr.expected_uplift: Production-grade mesh. First customer SLA-able. Swarm factory can run full 2-4 week QA.
phase_3_first_revenue_30000_100000_inr.pdf_reference: PDF Phase 3: Layer 3 Multi-Swarm SaaS Factory (Beta)

investments.reason: Host multiple customer meshes and parallel swarm pipelines concurrently

investments.reason: $800-1200 used RTX 4090 for local LLM inference. Only if paid API costs exceed ₹30K/month.
